LAW AND MOTION 301, MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT WILL RULE ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AFTER CHECKING THE VALIDITY OF THE FILE STAMPED PROOF OF SERVICE THAT DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WILL PROVIDE. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO THE MOTION. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ALONG WITH THE FILE STAMPED PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. IF GRANTED IT WILL BE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
G. Patrick Galloway, Esq. of Galloway, Lucchese, et al, 925-930-9090 for defendant and moving party Leonard Gordon.
Edward Freeman, 702-466-2267, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D and the Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling.
THE COURT WILL RULE ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AFTER CHECKING THE VALIDITY OF THE FILE STAMPED PROOF OF SERVICE THAT DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WILL PROVIDE. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO THE MOTION. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ALONG WITH THE FILE STAMPED PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION.
IF GRANTED IT WILL BE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.(301/JLW)

MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edward Kelly, Esq. of Otus & Assoc., 650-548-2100 moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Edward Freeman.
Edward Freeman, 702-466-2267 plaintiff appearing himself and opposing the motion.
Joseph Finkel, Esq. of Galloway, Lucchese, et al, 925-930-9090 for defendant and oppposing party Leonard Gordon.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled as follows --
Edward Kelly, Esq.'s motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF EDWARD FREEMAN WILL BE GRANTED PROVIDED THAT MOVING PARTY SUBMIT TO THE COURT A DECALRATION ALONG WITH AN ORDER ON JUDICIAL COUNSEL FORM CONTINUING THE TRIAL DATE CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR 1/30/06 FOR AT LEAST 2 MONTHS AND CONTINUING THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR 12/30/05 IN DEPT 301 TO 30 DAYS BEFORE THE NEW TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558 (301/JLW)
